title: synostemon rigens
intro: Synostemon rigens, also known as the native Australian bush tomato or lemon myrtle, is a shrub native to the deserts and grasslands of Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective against various infections and conditions. The health benefits of Synostemon rigens include its ability to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Synostemon rigens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
